summary::Here Are The Perfect Pokémon Fo: Simon Peter, the leader of the 12 apostles, would likely have Geodude as his first Pokémon partner due to its strength and ability to withstand harsh environments. His second partner could be Cramorant, reflecting his role as a fisher and his message of catching people off guard with Jesus' teachings.
summary::Crimson Desert's Kliff actor wo: Crimson Desert's Kliff actor would play the character "forever," and thinks his relationship with other key characters is "territory that can be even further developed" in order to take their story to new heights.
summary::GTA 6 release was supposed to b: Rockstar's highly anticipated game, GTA 6, was set to release today but has been delayed yet again. Fans are holding out hope for a brief update from the developer, with some jokingly referring to it as "hopium." The delay is likely to be frustrating for developers and gamers alike, who have been eagerly awaiting the new installment in the popular series.
summary::Metal Gear Solid 4's Master Col: Konami's Metal Gear Solid 4 Master Collection has been showcased with impressive new footage, confirming a 60fps frame rate and significantly reduced load times. The collection is built using the FOX Engine, which enables these performance improvements. This upgrade will be welcome news to fans of the series, who can now enjoy smoother gameplay and faster loading times.
summary::Indie Dev Claims Zenless Zone Z: Michal Kamm claims that his game Ouros bears more than a little resemblance to indie dev Bluesky's minigame Zenless Zone Zero, which features a similar track-bending mechanic. The similarities don't end at gameplay mechanics, with both games also incorporating design elements such as portals and hint systems. Hoyoverse has been accused of copying elements from other developers in the past, including Genshin Impact and Map Map A Game About Maps.
summary::Addon reorganized: The "Addon reorganized" file has been reorganized from its previous structure, moving files and assets into separate folders. This change allows for easier organization and navigation of the game's content. The update is part of a larger effort to improve the overall structure and usability of Magic Cliffs. Developers will appreciate the new layout as it streamlines their workflow and enhances the overall gaming experience.
summary::added the add on: The GothicVania Cemetery has released an updated addon pack called Add On that includes a complete graveyard scene made with pixel art for the GameDev platformer Castlevania. The update adds new sizes to the sprites, including death animation and player add-on 1. The cemetery is available as a free download from itch.io.
summary::Re-organized the Character File: The Character Files have been re-organized for better management and accessibility within the GothicVania Bridge game assets repository. The files were previously scattered across multiple folders, making it difficult to locate specific character data. This change allows developers to easily find and access character information, streamlining their workflow and improving overall project efficiency.
summary::Stan Lee’s Voice And Likeness H: Stan Lee's voice and likeness have been sold to an AI company for audiobooks and comic books, raising concerns about the exploitation of his legacy by corporate interests. ElevenLabs is using a mock-up of Lee's voice and likeness in its speech synthesis technology, which it plans to use to create new content such as comic book panels and audiobooks. This move has sparked outrage among fans who feel that their beloved creator's voice and image are being used without his consent or knowledge.
summary::Generative AI finally sends Hid: Generative AI finally sends Hideo Kojima into space in new short film with Death Stranding 2 partner Nicolas Winding Refn, which was immediately blasted as AI slop. The short film, directed by Nicolas Winding Refn and starring Hideo Kojima, features the two collaborating on a project that has been met with widespread criticism for its lack of coherence and poor execution. Critics have panned the film's use of generative AI technology, which was touted as a key element in bringing the story to life.
summary::The Dev Of Cult Hit Butterfly S: The Dev Of Cult Hit Butterfly Soup Is Making A Queer Chinese Fantasy About Solving Murders While Riding A Giant Crane is a new visual novel/adventure game by Brianna Lei that follows Mourn-No-More as they solve a murder mystery while riding on a giant crane. The game features Pentiment-style skill checks and a Disco Elysium-like skill tree, allowing players to invest points in abilities like Birdsong and Whimsy. It also has beautiful backgrounds and music composed by Starling Tan, who is working on another game with great music.
summary::Indie Dev Accuses Zenless Zone: Indie dev accuses Zenless Zone Zero of copying his game Ouros, claiming similarities in gameplay mechanics and design elements including portals, buttons, and hint systems. The incident has sparked a debate among fans about whether Hoyoverse's billion-dollar-generating gacha games are truly original or simply pastiches of other developers' work.
summary::A Retirement Home&#8217;s Wii S: Wii Sports bowling has become a ubiquitous feature in retirement homes, with teams competing against each other and achieving impressive undefeated streaks. This phenomenon is likely due to the game's accessibility, intuitive controls, and faithful representation of the real-life bowling experience. The fact that it can be played by people who didn't grow up gaming adds to its appeal.
